creator: yonas.yanfa@gmail.com
text:
I believe we're missing a few library dependencies.

The ones marked by this port are:

libzmq.so : net/libzmq4
libsqlite3.so : databases/sqlite3


The libraries I see linked are:

$ ldd /usr/local/bin/mongrel2
/usr/local/bin/mongrel2:
        libzmq.so.5 => /usr/local/lib/libzmq.so.5 (0x823094000)                                                                                                                                                      
        libdl.so.1 => /usr/lib/libdl.so.1 (0x822879000)
        libsqlite3.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libsqlite3.so.0 (0x82381b000)
        libmbedtls.so.14 => /usr/local/lib/libmbedtls.so.14 (0x82458e000)
        libmbedx509.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libmbedx509.so.1 (0x825545000)
        libmbedcrypto.so.7 => /usr/local/lib/libmbedcrypto.so.7 (0x8257e7000)
        libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x825fb3000) 
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x826d88000)
        libpgm-5.2.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpgm-5.2.so.0 (0x827fe6000)
        libnorm.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libnorm.so.1 (0x828047000)
        librt.so.1 => /usr/lib/librt.so.1 (0x82863a000)
        libc++.so.1 => /usr/lib/libc++.so.1 (0x828d57000)
        libcxxrt.so.1 => /lib/libcxxrt.so.1 (0x82960e000)
        libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x829e04000)
        libgcc_s.so.1 => /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x82a457000)
        libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x82ae51000)


We seem to be missing libmbedtls, libmbedx509, libmbedcrypto, openpgm, norm.
